item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -eu
json='longhorizon-work/scenario-02/config/onboarding.json'
doc='longhorizon-work/scenario-02/docs/onboarding.md'
mode="'$(jq -r '"'.mode' \""'$json")
max_parallel=$(jq -r '"'.max_parallel' \""'$json")
owner=$(jq -r '"'.owner' \""'$json")
queue_1=$(jq -r '"'.queues[0]' \""'$json")
queue_2=$(jq -r '"'.queues[1]' \""'$json")
[ "$(awk '"'/"'^```/{n++} END{print n+0}'"' \""'$doc")" -eq 2 ]
mode_line=$(rg -n -- "--mode $mode" "$doc" | cut -d: -f1)
parallel_line=$(rg -n -- "--max-parallel $max_parallel" "$doc" | cut -d: -f1)
owner_line=$(rg -n -- "--owner $owner" "$doc" | cut -d: -f1)
queue_1_line=$(rg -n -- "--queue $queue_1" "$doc" | cut -d: -f1)
queue_2_line=$(rg -n -- "--queue $queue_2" "$doc" | cut -d: -f1)
[ "$queue_1_line" -lt "$queue_2_line" ]
printf '"'PASS one fenced example\\n'
printf 'PASS mode=%s at line %s\\n' \""'$mode" "$mode_line"
printf '"'PASS max_parallel=%s at line %s\\n' \""'$max_parallel" "$parallel_line"
printf '"'PASS owner=%s at line %s\\n' \""'$owner" "$owner_line"
printf '"'PASS queue order=%s -> %s at lines %s -> %s\\n' \""'$queue_1" "$queue_2" "$queue_1_line" "$queue_2_line"'

item.aggregated_output:
PASS one fenced example
PASS mode=batch at line 8
PASS max_parallel=3 at line 9
PASS owner=operations at line 10
PASS queue order=new -> retry at lines 11 -> 12
